src: KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.
ja: KitchenOwlはセルフホスト型の買い物リスト・レシピ管理アプリです。バックエンドはFlask、フロントエンドはFlutterで構築されています。買い物前に簡単にアイテムをリストへ追加でき、レシピの作成や料理に合わせた食材の追加も可能です。
